box.content: The High-Performance Vue Framework.

list.text: Nuxt 3: The intuitive way to build Vue apps.
Nitro: The next-gen server engine.

box.content: Aravind Govindhasamy

list.text: Elite Technical Architect
Vue Ecosystem Expert

box.content: The power of the Composition API and Vite.
Nuxt 3 is built from the ground up for Vue 3, leveraging its high performance and modularity.

list.text: Modular: Composition API for better logic reuse.
Fast: Built-in support for Vite for instant dev starts.

box.content: Zero-config development with automatic imports for components, composables, and Vue APIs.

list.text: Seamless: No need to manually import `ref`, `computed`, or components.
Tree-shaken: Only the code you use is included in the build.

box.content: Define your application structure through the filesystem.

list.text: pages/: Automatically generates routes based on folder structure.
layouts/: Reusable UI shells for your pages.

box.content: Nuxt handles both server-side and client-side rendering out of the box.

list.text: SSR: Fast initial load and excellent SEO.
Hydration: Seamless transition to a single-page app in the browser.

box.content: The engine that powers Nuxt 3.
A portable, performant, and lightweight server engine for Node.js and the Edge.

list.text: Fast: Built with Rollup and Unjs packages.
Portable: Deploy to any runtime without modification.

box.content: A unified storage layer for different drivers (Redis, FS, Cloudflare KV).
Create type-safe API routes easily in the `server/api` directory.
Intercept and handle requests on the server side before they reach your components.

list.text: Security: Add headers or validation.
Logging: Track request performance.

box.content: Mastering useFetch and useAsyncData.
The most common way to fetch data in Nuxt. Isomorphic and SSR-friendly.
box.code: const { data, pending, error } = await useFetch('/api/users');

box.content: Flexible data fetching for complex scenarios or when using non-fetch sources (e.g., SDKs).
Nuxt provides `$fetch` which works on both server and client, calling server routes directly on the server to save overhead.

list.text: Direct Call: Skips the network layer when on the server.
Consistent: Same API everywhere.

box.content: Automatically re-fetch data when reactive parameters change.
Tailoring rendering to your needs.
Choosing the right strategy for each route in your application.

list.text: SSG: Static Site Generation for speed and cost.
SSR: Server-Side Rendering for real-time data.

box.content: Update static content in the background after deployment without a full rebuild.
Serve cached content immediately and refresh it in the background.
The experimental future of server-only components in Nuxt.

list.text: Islands: Render a component on the server with zero client JS.
Efficient: Reduce the payload size significantly.

box.content: Reactivity at scale with Nuxt 3.
A Nuxt-specific composable for creating SSR-friendly shared state.
The official state management library for Vue, seamlessly integrated into Nuxt.

list.text: Store-based: Modular and type-safe stores.
SSR Ready: Automatic state hydration from server to client.

box.content: How Nuxt ensures that the state you set on the server is available in the browser without re-fetching.

list.text: Hydration: The process of attaching Vue to the server-rendered HTML.
Seamless: User sees the final state immediately.

box.content: Defining reusable logic and state in the `composables/` directory.
box.code:
// composables/useAuth.js
export const useAuth = () => useState('auth', () => ({ user: null }));

box.content: Building powerful APIs with Nitro.
Organization of backend logic, separated from your frontend components.

list.text: api/: JSON API endpoints.
routes/: Custom server routes.
middleware/: Server-side request interceptors.

box.content: Type-safe handlers with access to the H3 event and context.
Leveraging Nitro utilities for headers, cookies, and redirects.
Connecting to databases like PostgreSQL or MongoDB within server routes.

list.text: ORM: Use Prisma or Drizzle for type-safety.
Lifecycle: Manage connections in server plugins.

box.content: Deploying Nuxt 3 anywhere.
Nitro enables Nuxt to run on Node.js, Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Workers, and more.

list.text: Adaptability: Change hosting without changing code.
Edge Enabled: Run your entire app at the edge.

box.content: Deploying Nuxt to the Cloudflare global network.
Creating production-ready Docker images for your Nuxt application.

list.text: Lean: Use alpine-based images for minimal footprint.
Predictable: Consistent environment across all stages.

box.content: Key areas to optimize before going live.

list.text: Critical CSS: Inline important styles for fast FCP.
Analyze: Use the Nuxt bundle analyzer to find bloat.

box.content: Mastering Nuxt Islands and Slots.
Render non-interactive components on the server for zero client bundle impact.
Using the `.server.vue` suffix to ensure a component never reaches the client.

list.text: Isolated: Logic stays on the server.
Lean: No JS hydration required.

box.content: Advanced content projection patterns for complex UI structures.
Supercharging Nuxt with the community ecosystem.
A powerful in-browser dashboard for inspecting your application.

list.text: Insight: Inspect routes, components, and state.
Timeline: Track performance and request logs.

box.content: Seamless integration of Tailwind CSS into your Nuxt project.
Full-stack authentication patterns for Nuxt applications.

list.text: Flexible: Supports NextAuth.js providers.
Secure: Built-in session handling and middleware.

box.content: Testing Nuxt 3 with Vitest and Playwright.
High-performance unit testing for your composables and utilities.
Official utilities for testing Nuxt components and server routes.
box.code:
import { mountSuspended } from '@nuxt/test-utils/runtime';
const component = await mountSuspended(MyComponent);

box.content: End-to-end testing that covers everything from the server response to browser interaction.

list.text: Realistic: Validates the full SSR and hydration flow.
Stable: Integrated with Nuxt's development server.

box.content: The Future of Professional Vue Apps.
The most intuitive and powerful way to build high-performance web applications with Vue.

list.text: Industrial: Best-in-class developer experience.
Performance: Nitro ensures elite speed everywhere.
Community: A vast and growing ecosystem of modules.

box.content: Stay tuned for further optimizations and deeper Nitro integration.

list.text: Evolution: Nuxt continues to push the boundaries of web development.
Tooling: Expect even faster builds and better debugging.

box.content: Start your Nuxt 3 journey today.

list.text: Build: Create a new project with `npx nuxi@latest init`.
Learn: Dive into the official documentation.

box.content: Thank you for your time! Any questions?
